zh-CN.name: 爷爷
zh-CN.intro: 爷爷是爸爸的爸爸，他很爱我们。爷爷会给我们讲故事，陪我们玩，还会做好吃的。

story.title: 🧓小熊和爷爷的一天
story.body: 星期天早上，小熊早早起床，跑去找爷爷。爷爷张开大大的手臂，给小熊一个温暖的抱抱。吃过早饭，爷爷戴上老花镜，拿出故事书，给小熊讲勇敢的小兔子的故事。小熊听得眼睛亮晶晶的。下午，爷爷带小熊去公园散步。爷爷走得不快，小熊就牵着爷爷的手慢慢走。爷爷指着一棵大树说：“这棵树和爷爷一样年纪大啦！”小熊哈哈笑。回家后，爷爷和小熊一起搭积木，搭了一座高高的城堡。晚上，爷爷轻轻拍着小熊：“乖宝贝，好好睡觉，明天爷爷再陪你玩。”小熊甜甜地睡着了，梦里还和爷爷在一起。

knowledge.title: 爷爷为什么有白头发？
knowledge.body: 人年纪大了，头发就会慢慢变白，这是很自然的事情。爷爷的皱纹和白发都是生活的故事，每一根都藏着爱和智慧。

en.name: Grandpa
en.intro: Grandpa is daddy's daddy. He loves us very much. Grandpa tells us stories, plays with us, and makes yummy food.

story.title: 🧓 Little Bear's Day with Grandpa
story.body: On Sunday morning, Little Bear woke up early and ran to find Grandpa. Grandpa opened his arms wide and gave Little Bear a warm hug. After breakfast, Grandpa put on his reading glasses and took out a storybook. He told Little Bear the story of a brave bunny. Little Bear's eyes sparkled with joy. In the afternoon, Grandpa took Little Bear for a walk in the park. Grandpa didn't walk fast, so Little Bear held his hand and walked slowly. Grandpa pointed to a big tree and said, 'This tree is as old as Grandpa!' Little Bear giggled. Back home, Grandpa and Little Bear built blocks together and made a tall castle. At night, Grandpa gently patted Little Bear: 'Sleep tight, sweetheart. Grandpa will play with you again tomorrow.' Little Bear fell asleep sweetly, still dreaming of Grandpa.

knowledge.title: Why does Grandpa have white hair?
knowledge.body: As people get older, their hair turns white naturally. Grandpa's wrinkles and white hair are stories of life, each one full of love and wisdom.
